payload.author: claude
payload.body: E2E VERIFIED against real Postgres (docker compose / colima). New test/cloud-auth-pg.test.js exercises the full cloud HTTP flow: no-cred=401, session-JWT cookie=200, a session mints an API key, that key authenticates standalone, bogus key=401, and the sync push actor-authz (mismatch=403 ACTOR_MISMATCH, match=200). Full suite now 261/261, 0 skipped with SCOPE_PG_URL set. Only the live github.com OAuth round-trip remains unverified (needs a real OAuth app).
